title: TS3 → TS6 Server Roles Transfer
subtitle: Transfer your server roles from TeamSpeak 3 to TeamSpeak 6
warning_text: You must be logged in with one account on the TS3 server and one account on the TS6 server (in a new client tab). If we detect more than one account from the same IP address on either server - the transfer will not be performed.
discord_subtitle: Transfer your Discord roles to TeamSpeak 6
discord_warning_text: Log in with Discord and the bot will check your roles and transfer the corresponding ranks to TS6. You must be logged in with one account on the TS6 server.
err_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait 30 seconds.
err_ts3_not_found: Your account was not found on the TS3 server. Make sure you are logged in.
err_ts3_multiple: Detected {count} accounts logged into the TS3 server from your IP address ({ip}). You can only be logged in with one account! Disconnect extra accounts and try again.
err_ts6_not_found: Your account was not found on the TS6 server. Make sure you are logged in.
err_ts6_multiple: Detected {count} accounts logged into the TS6 server from your IP address ({ip}). You can only be logged in with one account! Disconnect extra accounts and try again.
err_discord_not_logged_in: You must log in with Discord first.
err_discord_fetch: Failed to fetch data from Discord:
msg_discord_no_roles: None of your Discord roles have a corresponding TS6 server group mapping.
msg_synced: All roles are already synced! Nothing to transfer.
msg_partial: Some roles were transferred, but errors occurred.
